title: Symoxin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Substance |image=[[File:Traumatize.jpg]] |name=Symoxin
''(A Rebel injects an Imperial with symoxin)'' |locations= |date= |discovered= |creators= |created= |type=[[Painkiller/Legends|Painkiller]]''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' |color= |properties= |uses=Render a target unconscious |cost= }} '''Symoxin''' was a fairly common{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|cardname=Traumatize}} contact painkiller. In concentrated doses, the drug could render a target unconscious within fifteen [[Standard second|seconds]]. It was commonly used as a knock-out [[Poison/Legends|poison]], perfect for use with [[Dart/Legends|dart]] launchers or other weapons.''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' *{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|cardname=Traumatize}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Anesthetics]]
